title: senecio theresiae
intro: Senecio theresiae is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the ragwort or Jacob's staff, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular remedy for treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial properties. Senecio theresiae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
